programme.desc: At the end of a desperate struggle, Koga corners Inuyasha, but he is extremely weakened by the poisonous shard in his arm.

programme.desc: Miroku is reunited with Koharu, a girl he once made advances on. He leaves her in a certain village, where Kanna, the older sister of Kagura, appears.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kanna's mirror fails to absorb Kagome's soul, probably because of its size, but it reflects Inuyasha's Wind Scar, the Tetsusaiga's special technique.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo gave the sacred jewel shards she had stolen from Kagome to Naraku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Totosai repairs the Tetsusaiga using one of Inuyasha's fangs. Meanwhile, Sessomaru takes the fangs of the deceased Goshinki to swordsmith Kaijinbo.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kaijinbo the swordsmith, manipulated by the sword Tokijin, charges at Inuyasha. In the end, he is wiped out by the force of the Tetsusaiga.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku's new minions, Juromaru and Kageromaru, attack Inuyasha and the gang. Koga comes to save Kagome from danger.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Because of the incident with Koga, Kagome has a fight with Inuyasha and goes back to the present day.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome returns to the present day. She is busy preparing for a mock exam two days later.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango finds the bodies of her father and the other slayers at the ruins of Naraku's castle.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango's brother Kohaku is being manipulated by Naraku and is after Kagome's life.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and the gang overcome Naraku's trap involving Kohaku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha transforms into a demon when his life is in danger. He quickly destroys Gatenmaru, who has become a giant moth.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha visits Totosai's workplace by himself. The Tetsusaiga was broken by Goshinki, and Inuyasha's own fang was used to repair it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Ryukotsusei knocks away the Tetsusaiga, and Inuyasha transforms into a demon.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stars Rosie Marcel and Bob Barrett scour Cambridgeshire and Bedfordshire with David Harper and Louise Gostelow for antiques. Bob's trip is blocked by a flood and Rosie swaps her classic car for a vehicle once driven by royalty.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actresses, models, and friends Helen Flanagan and Jorgie Porter pair with experts Phil Serrell and James Braxton. They scour some of Scotland's finest antique shops and uncover an interesting tea caddy and an unusual ship's compass.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalist and presenter Mariella Frostrup and designer Pearl Lowe rummage in Somerset with antique experts James Braxton and Raj Bisram.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Presenters Adam Henson and Steve Brown are on the hunt for antiques in the rolling Cotswold Hills, accompanied by experts Roo Irvine and David Harper. Adams games on a rare collectible, while Steve finds an ancient Chinese antique.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stanley Johnson and Georgia 'Toff' Toffolo search Cumbria for antiques with experts Paul Laidlaw and Izzie Balmer. Will a snake or a horse prove to be the most profitable?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedian Bobby Davro and singer Sheila Ferguson are on a trip around Kent with James Braxton and Catherine Southon. Expect a firedog, a rocking horse and a green jellyfish.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In West Yorkshire, comedians Jamali Maddix and Bobby Mair battle for the best punch line and most profitable antique with experts Natasha Raskin-Sharp and Angus Ashworth.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists Clive Myrie and Reeta Chakrabarti find a French casket and a rocking horse to sell at auction, while James Braxton needs no excuse to strip for a cold-water dip.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Broadcaster Eamonn Holmes and award-winning actress Victoria Smurfit find antiques in Kent with connections to Columbus and royalty, dutifully aided by experts Phil and Catherine.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Countdown's Rachel Riley competes with husband and Strictly partner Pasha Kovalev to find antiques. David and Paul assist but will maths skills or fancy footwork win the day?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Danny Dyer and daughter Dani join auctioneers Natasha and Phil on an antiques hunt in Essex. Expect pirates, a raft race, sunken treasure and a huge Chinese banquet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow returns to Scone Palace in Perthshire, Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow welcomes visitors to Derby's Roundhouse.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include an intricate bamboo pot and a valuable piece of Star Wars memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: An amazing update about an ornate French plant stand last seen on the Roadshow in 1991.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In a special episode from the Somme, the team hears stories of courage in wartime.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a carved coconut and a frog-shaped brooch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a collection of cut-throat razors and a Tiffany mosaic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a Rolex that James Bond would be proud of and an old train ticket.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A look back at some of the year's highlights and updates on some memorable items.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a sweetheart brooch, a Victorian penknife, and secret D-Day documents.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include an art deco pendant with a hint of Egypt and some charming tiles.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a miniature kitchen range, a merchant's ring, and a sextant.

programme.title: The Great Rift: Africa's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Life adapts to the volcanic highlands bordering Africa's Rift Valley.

programme.title: The Great Rift: Africa's Wild Heart
programme.desc: The freshwater and marine habitats of Africa's Great Rift Valley.

programme.title: The Great Rift: Africa's Wild Heart
programme.desc: Animals adapt to the Rift Valley's savannah ecosystem.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: The nature of the Nile as seen through the eyes of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: The Ethiopian highlands are the source of the unpredictable floods along the Nile.

programme.title: Nile
programme.desc: Following the footsteps of explorers Livingstone, Stanley, Burton and Speke, through jungles and swamps into the heart of Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers set out on a wildlife adventure to the tropical island of Borneo for the elusive clouded leopard and the rare Borneo gibbon.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and his team decide to press on with their ascent of Mount Kuli.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers venture into the interior of Borneo, with the aim of preserving the area.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: A team of explorers venture into the interior of Borneo, with the aim of preserving the area.

programme.title: Expedition Borneo
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and his colleagues attempt a daring descent; they go through the sinkhole in the middle of a mountain.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The riches of the Caribbean and the processes that shape them.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning underwater treasures of the Caribbean Sea, including the world's second largest barrier reef and countless shipwrecks.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The survival stories of the islands' wildlife residents following the Caribbean hurricane season.

programme.title: Wildlife Specials
programme.desc: An in-depth look into wildlife and nature.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella Lawson shares the secrets of her Italian roast chicken, served alongside a saffron orzotto; Nigella prepares coffee ice cream for dessert, inspired by the ice cream parlors of Florence; a chocolate olive oil cake provides an extra treat.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Pork loin stuffed with Parma ham and oregano, served alongside her speedy mock mash and lazy person's vignarola.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Liquorice pudding; Sardinian sun-dried and toasted couscous; butterflied leg of lamb; baby aubergines with oregano and roasted red onion.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella starts with her take on a light and sunny yogurt pot cake; she recruits her niece and nephew to make a shortcut sausage meatball supper; Nigella prepares squid and prawns with marjoram and chili; a tiramisini ends the evening.

programme.desc: Nigel demonstrates how to make our ingredients go a little bit further.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel shows that spicy food isn't all about hot chilis, but a range of everyday spices.

programme.desc: How to make simple, delicious feasts from ingredients that seem to have seen better days.

programme.desc: Nigel creates a week's worth of meals from ingredients that are sometimes overlooked.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon goes to Orange County, California, and attempts to revitalize Pineapple Hill Grill, a neighborhood bar whose owner's hands-off approach puts patrons at risk.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pahrump, Nevada to save a VFW hall from permanently closing its doors and to help its commanding officer step away to take care of his ailing wife.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon faces a real challenge with Cashmere Nightclub in North Carolina, where the wild manager thinks it's OK to sell cheap booze from pricey bottles.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon has to straighten out the abrasive owner of the St8 Pub, who has squandered a generous deal from the landlord and taken advantage of his mother financially.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps an owner who battled childhood illness and the loss of his father learn how to run a bar and manage a business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The dysfunctional owners of the O Face Bar are so inexperienced and chaotic Jon doesn't even know if he wants to save their business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits Rockin' Rhonda's Lounge, a bar literally on the brink of collapse after the insurance company refused to pay for damage caused by Hurricane Matthew.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An Irish bar owner's American dream threatens to go up in smoke when Jon discovers he's been withholding employees' paychecks to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon crashes the party at a failing bar where out-of-control bartenders would rather dance than pour drinks.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Phoenix to help the owner of The Armadillo Grill get her business back in order as she desperately tries to pay back her father, but faces $450,000 of debt.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life-threatening. Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie is suspended from Baywatch over the statutory rape charge. He feels abandoned when no one believes his innocence pleas. Meanwhile, the reckless, paraplegic Turner, wanting to win Megan back, tries to impress her by hang-gliding off a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch falls for the beautiful woman he saved from drowning after she drove her car off a cliff, unaware that she's a cold-blooded murderer and con artist who was attempting to dispose of the murder victim of her latest scam when Mitch rescued her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his ex-wife Gayle reconnect at their twenty-year high school reunion with unforeseen results. Eddie discovers an abandoned baby under his tower with a note imploring him to take care of it for 24 hours.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Drug lord Mason Sato is released from prison and determined to seek revenge Mitch Buchannon, who helped send him away. When Sato kidnaps Hobie and Kaye, Mitch and Sato end up in a samurai-style fight to the death.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Reports of a coming storm and enormous waves bring painful memories for Mitch. Meanwhile, Kaye tries to persuade the parents of a deaf girl to send her to sign-language school.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A drugged-out drifter torches Eddie's lifeguard tower which leads the team to discover an illegal, lab distributing a new drug. Mitch and Thorpe try to convince the city board to buy wave runners in order to optimize their ability to save lives.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Eddie slips on the sand and hits his head on the tower ramp. When he regains consciousness, Eddie finds himself on an island with Gilligan, Mary Ann and the rest of the castaways.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch has an out-of-body experience when his attempt to save a trapped diver without scuba gear leaves him with the bends, dangerously close to death and in desperate need of a decompression chamber.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Shauni is suspicious when a swimmer training for the Olympics disappears in "Shark's Cove.” Eddie's world is turned upside-down when he is reunited with his schizophrenic half-brother.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A bohemian poet flirts with Shauni, and with danger when he uses his metal detector to find the buried stash of two jewel thieves.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch helps a former lifeguard, Lane Brody, investigate a corporation suspected of dumping deadly chemicals in the bay.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Harvey and Mitch go to play poker on an offshore yacht where they are robbed by a masked man that drives an amphibious Jeep. Shauni invites Eddie over for dinner at her parents’ house where her snobbish father strongly disapproves of him.

programme.title: Bellator 245: Machida vs Davis
programme.desc: A long-awaited rematch between two of the best light heavyweights in the world. Phil “Mr. Wonderful” Davis collides with Lyoto “The Dragon” Machida in battle.

programme.title: Bellator 246: Archuleta vs Mix
programme.desc: A bantamweight world title is on the line as hard-charging Juan “The Spaniard” Archuleta collides with undefeated submission machine Patchy “No Love” Mix.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: From the Mohegan Sun Arena, reigning Bellator Lightweight and Featherweight World Champion Patricio Pitbull defends his title against the relentless Emmanuel 'El Matador' Sanchez in a long awaited rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to the Mohegan Sun Arena. Reigning Bellator Heavyweight World Champion and former Bellator Light Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader takes on MMA leg-end Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida in a rematch over eight years in the making.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to the Mohegan Sun Arena as newly crowned Bellator MMA Light Heavyweight World Champion Vadim Nemkov puts his belt on the line against Phil 'Mr. Wonderful' Davis in a highly anticipated rematch.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Bantamweight World Champion Juan 'The Spaniard' Archuleta puts his belt on the line against the Sergio'S.P' Pettis. Also Anthony 'Rumble' Johnson makes his Bellator MMA debut in the Grand Prix as he battles Jose 'Gugu' Augusto.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Women’s Featherweight World Champion Cris Cyborg puts her belt on the line against Leslie 'The Peacemaker' Smith. Former Bantamweight World Champion Darrion 'The Wolf' Caldwell makes his return in a showdown with Leandro 'Alter' Higo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA Welterweight World Champion Douglas 'The Phenom' Lima puts his belt on the line against undefeated Ukrainian Yaroslav 'Dynamo' Amo-sov. Legendary knockout artist Paul 'Semtex' Daley collides with Jason 'The Ass Kicking Machine' Jackson.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: It's Ask Dr. Phil day. Is it an attractive woman's responsibility to tone down her looks on the job? Debrahlee made headlines saying she was fired for being too pretty. She says she was told her figure, pencil skirts & 3-inch heels were too distracting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mary says husband Jesse is abusive, unfaithful, controlling & she feels she's living in a prison. Jesse says he's not controlling, he's just "containing the beast," & his wife needs to abide by his rules if she wants to stay married. Dr. Sophy steps in.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he can't choose between his wife, Michele, and his girlfriend, who's calling herself "Sarah" to protect her identity. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Autumn says she was called a “crazy, jealous girlfriend” after video of her keying her ex-boyfriend’s car went viral. She says ex-boyfriend, D’Andre, choked her, head-butted her and sexually assaulted her; D’Andre denies sexually assaulting her. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mark & ex-wife, Melissa, say daughter, Malia, 17, has been running away since age 13, a 6th grade school drop out, & has become physically abusive. They say 2 years ago she became involved with a 35-year-old man & they fear she'll end up dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Women: Are you dying to know what men really think? Comedian and radio and TV host Steve Harvey has all the "manswers"! In his book, Straight Talk, No Chaser, Steve dishes the dirt about unlocking the male mind and understanding the male game.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Libby & Brian are at war over custody of their two young children. Get a behind-the-scenes look at what made Dr. Phil consider canceling the show & learn why he refused to allow these exes on his stage! Don't miss the backstage drama on today's Dr. Phil!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Brittany who says dad Charlie is being scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie hopes to get married when they meet in person. The real women in the photos are on stage & Charlie goes face-to-face!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha & Danielle are angry with dad, Ron, who they say abandoned their dying mother, his wife of 30 yrs, to plan a wedding with a Kennedy heiress he met online. His daughters say "Misty Kennedy" is a catfish. Ron says "Misty" is the love of his life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin says ex-husband, Daniel, kidnapped their two daughters. Daniel claims false--his goal is to protect his daughters! Robin says Daniel "convinced" their daughters to leave home & meet him on the corner with only the clothes on their backs. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Terrie says daughter Kelly accused her of molesting her 5-yr-old granddaughter. Terrie says Kelly attended a week-long desert retreat that affected her personality: Kelly says she saw aliens on the retreat who may have abducted, raped & impregnated her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil spoke with Karen & Jim desperate to remove their mooching son from their home. Kyle revealed why his parents were at fault for his financial situation. Dr. Phil enlists the help of TVs "Bar Rescue", Jon Taffer, with advice for Kyle. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Leah says mom Dora appears sweet but she's actually a narcissist, hypochondriac, drama queen & liar. Can this mother-daughter find common ground and rebuild? Plus Carrie says mom Paula, 61, has been meeting strangers online having sex. Dr. Phil weighs in.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" host Guy Fieri is joining Drew to chat and play a game! Dating expert Damona Hoffman is joining Drew, Ross Mathews and his husband Wellington Garciato talk about love and soulmates.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, "Bros" stars Ts Madison, Jim Rash and Miss Lawrence.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Dictator Lunches" author Jenny Mollen joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from Ashton Kutcher and wife Mila Kunis's no closed-door policy to a mom who went viral for changing her son's name at 18-months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross are joined by beauty guru Zanna Roberts Rassi at the news desk to break down the latest beauty headlines. Then, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Zanna transforms a busy mom of two and special needs teacher.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Drew is surprising a very deserving do-gooder in a big way!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews cover woman's library wellness check & how cuddling helps health. 2 guests get eyebrow makeover tips while Danny Seo shares paper recycling tip on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" Natalie Morales, Jerry O'Connell, Sheryl Underwood, Akbar Gbaja-Biamila and Amanda Kloots are joining Drew and taking on the final five to answer rapid fire questions about themselves!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines. Plus, its Drew' News: The Weekender Edition, a curated list of must-haves, must watches and more to do this weekend from Drew!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: David Duchovny talks about his career and upcoming rom-com with Drew. Kirby Howell-Baptiste joins Drew and Ross for Drew's News, discussing dating and British foods.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's an all-new Drewber, when actress and entrepreneur Cameron Diaz joins Drew in her minivan to chat while cruising around NYC. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes is sharing her delicious makeover recipe for one of the most common fridge leftovers, rice!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, in all new Drew Crime, Drew meets mixed martial artist Ro Malabanan.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hey Dude the 90's Called" podcast host and actress Christine Taylor is joining Drew to chat about working together on "The Wedding Singer" and some of her iconic roles in classics like "Dodgeball" and "The Brady Bunch Movie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics. Stephanie Izard is joining Drew in the kitchen to make something delicious. Eve Rodsky is sharing home equity tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Long Island Medium" star Theresa Caputo is chatting with Drew about her work as a medium, the show and more. She's also doing a special reading of the studio audience.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Paris in Love" star Paris Hilton joins Drew to chat. Then, CBS News Anchor Michelle Miller is helping Drew and Ross hit the headlines at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bros" star and co-producer Guy Branum joins Drew and Ross at the new's desk. Plus, "Bros" stars Billy Eichner and Luke Macfarlane stop by to chat and play a rousing game of Never Have I Ever with a twist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May gets a job at Mr. Drysdale's bank and moves into co-worker Jane Hathaway's apartment.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro leaves home when he learns his ugly childhood sweetheart is coming for a visit, not knowing she has become a beauty contest winner.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dick Bremerkamp, a penniless actor, learns the Clampetts are millionaires and begins romancing Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A fortune-hunting young man decides to amrry into the hillbilly family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jane Hathaway learns her new boyfriend is a fortune-hunter who would like to marry Elly May and her family's millions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampett's before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish

programme.title: HQ Scoreboard Final
programme.desc: CBS Sports HQ analysts break down the day's top stories and highlights.

programme.title: HQ Morning Buzz
programme.desc: Start your day with the top sports headlines and highlights.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Día de las madres
programme.desc: Los secretos surgen cuando la ex suegra de Gibbs aparece como testigo en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Doble identidad
programme.desc: El equipo investiga el asesinato de un marine y descubre más cosas sobre su vida de las que nadie habría imaginado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Jurisdicción
programme.desc: El equipo descubre sorprendentes similitudes entre ellos y sus homólogos del CGIS cuando aparece muerto un buzo de la Marina que buscaba un tesoro hundido.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Placer culpable
programme.desc: La muerte de un oficial de la Marina lleva a Gibbs y al equipo al mundo de las prostitutas de lujo, confiando en la madame Holly Snow para que les ayude a atrapar a un asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La BAU investiga a las víctimas que documentaban sus vidas personales y sus deseos internos en publicaciones de blogs y redes sociales. Además, Kevin se pone celoso cuando descubre que García puede tener un nuevo interés en el amor.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al viejo barrio de Morgan en la ciudad de Chicago en busca de un sujeto cuyo objetivo son los hombres de mediana edad. Y una pista lleva a Morgan a creer que van tras alguien relacionado con el hombre que abusó de él cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect attempts to flee from police, officers find a wanted man trespassing in someone's yard, and officers stop two people suspected of stealing a moped.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disgruntled man is tased, leaving his unhoused wife to fend for herself. A sovereign citizen is arrested for a stolen firearm. A man in possession of meth claims a bag belongs to his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seasoned corporal gives some advice to a young man with a new motorcycle. A woman’s impatience lands her in hot water when she’s pulled over for tailgating. Officers give a driver multiple chances to come clean to no avail.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist leads officers on a high-speed chase, a dead car battery won't stop a man from eluding the police, and a wanted driver fails to avoid an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies. A shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water. A young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman bites both the arresting officer and a store manager after getting caught stealing beer. The passenger of a suspicious vehicle is caught attempting to hide drugs in the seat. Police respond to a domestic abuse call involving a knife and two women.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A burglary results in an act of solidarity, a foot pursuit ends when the K-9 unit shows up, and a person with a substance user disorder leaves a strong impression on an officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man who threatened his neighbors redirects his anger toward the deputies, and a driver in crisis puts the lives of others on the line.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: 51 kilos of cocaine are found on a semi-truck during a traffic stop. A man on a bike tosses meth and weed as he flees into the woods. A woman uses a fire extinguisher to damage her girlfriend's door.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle. Recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time. A neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Diana es tan celosa y controladora que le implantó a Derick un micro GPS en el pene. En otro caso, a la hija de Teresa la intentaron violar en el parqueo de un centro comercial.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Miguel tiene una empresa de fumigación al borde de la quiebra por su inclinación a tener sexo con sus clientas. También, Marla está trabajando en casa de Marco para conseguir su ADN.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La renovación del estatus migratorio de Tony fue negada y será deportado. Por otro lado, Mia y Frankel son soldados y pasan por un estrés emocional que afecta la relación de pareja.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Guillermo estaba haciendo un 'reality show' y Lorena descubre que todo lo que sucede es montado. Por otro lado, César fue abusado sexualmente por su abuelo cuando era pequeño.

programme.desc: Indira tenía un noviazgo con el hijo de Gema, cuenta que el chico era agresivo, pero hay dudas de su versión. Dora tiene un gimnasio de yoga, en sus clases combina la práctica con la cerveza.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Natasha inventó en Internet una historia de violencia de su marido contra ella. En otro caso, Claribel quiere que su hija desaloje la casa, pues María acusó de abuso sexual a su papá.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Desde que Patricia tiene una relación de noviazgo con otro trabajador, Miriam le ha dado un ultimátum. Bryan se comió el plato de exposición de un restaurante, la dueña tomó acciones.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.desc: Sam volunteers to play in a charity softball game against Playboy Playmates.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam gets Coach's help to help him pass a geography class and get his high school diploma. But he eventually finds an easier way to pass the course.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm jeopardizes Cliff's job when he covers his route for a day.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz reclaims her job at the station; Daphne discovers she's pregnant.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Julia spoils Niles and Daphne's announcement that they're expecting.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A misunderstanding leads the town to believe that Frasier is gay.

programme.title: El tren del infierno
programme.desc: Mientras un tren atraviesa las Montañas Rocosas, los pasajeros están siendo asesinados. La única esperanza es John Deakin, el cual descubre un secreto que explota en un torrente de revelaciones impactantes, peleas y tiroteos explosivos.

programme.title: Pancho López
programme.desc: Un hombre es enviado a vender el ganado de un tío, pierde todo el dinero en el juego e inventa que fue asaltado.

programme.title: Juan Colorado
programme.desc: El norteño Juan, se enamora de la machorra Silvia, pero, su padre la quiere casar con un tal Rafael, el cual por celos y envidia, se une al padre de Silvia, para acabar con Juan. Ella al darse cuenta de lo que sucede, se viste como Juan para salvarlo.

programme.title: Yo soy Chucho el Roto (LAS)
programme.desc: El carpintero Jesús Arriaga se enamora de Erica Matilde, pero los tíos de ella se oponen a la relación y lo arrestan por robo. Se fuga de la cárcel y se convierte en un bandido generoso.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: El Hermano Capulina
programme.desc: Capulina abandona el digno oficio de limosnero, pero no por ello va a cometer la locura de trabajar. Va a dar a una orden de Frailes que se dedican a hacer la caridad y se enfrenta a los problemas de los Frailes y los de todos a su alrededor.

programme.title: El Dolor de Pagar la Renta
programme.desc: El dueño de una vecindad quiere lanzar a los inquilinos para construir otro dificio en el terreno. Capulina encuentra la manera de salvar a sus vecinos de perder sus hogares.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Aniquilación
programme.desc: Una bióloga (Natalie Portman) y un ex soldado (Oscar Isaac) dirigen una misión en un área de cuarentena misteriosa. “El Resplandor” un hermoso, pero letal mundo de paisajes mutados y criaturas que amenazan la vida en el mundo.

programme.title: Estallido mortal
programme.desc: Mientras graba sonidos en exteriores, un técnico de efectos sonoros (John Travolta) captura el mortal accidente de un candidato a la presidencia. Pero, ¿el sonido que oyó fue el estallido de un neumático o el disparo de un asesino?

programme.title: Asesinato al ritmo del tango
programme.desc: En este thriller evocador, un sicario experto (Robert Duvall) va a Buenos Aires para abatir a un general corrupto. Tras un repentino retraso de la operación, una sensual bailarina de tango le ha seducido y una conspiración mortal le ha traicionado.

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: The Quiet American
programme.desc: Situada en Vietnam en 1950, un estadounidense (Brendan Fraser) se enamora de la hermosa amante de un periodista británico (el ganador del Óscar® Michael Caine), provocando un triángulo amoroso. En este thriller político chocan el amor y la guerra

programme.title: Alfie, el seductor irresistible
programme.desc: Cuando las consecuencias de su estilo de vida afectan a la mujer que ama y a su mejor amigo (Omar Epps), Alfie comienza a preguntarse si hay cosas más importantes que estos romances pasajeros. De ser así, ¿de qué se trata?

programme.title: La Mexicana
programme.desc: Un hombre trata de llevar a través de la frontera una antigua pistola llamada La Mexicana, que se cree que está maldita, mientras su novia lo presiona para que abandone sus costumbres criminales.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Otra Boda en Castañer
programme.desc: Hace algunos años en el poblado de Castañer, se casó Mariana, hija del doctor Zalduondo. El mayor evento del poblado, en esta ocasión se casa su hijo Eduardito con su compañero Maurice, será la primer boda gay en el tradicional pueblo de Castañer.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Pecado original
programme.desc: Una mujer, junto con su amante, planea engañar a un hombre rico casándose con él, ganándose su confianza y luego huyendo con todo su dinero. Todo sale según lo previsto hasta que ella se enamora de él.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Perro salvaje
programme.desc: Una historia desarrollada en Indochina en 1959. Una tierra más allá de las reglas, una época despiadada y el nacimiento de una leyenda.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: En una joven República de China, Hou Jie nos muestra piedad con sus enemigos que buscan refugio con los monjes Shaolin. Hou Jie paga un precio terrible por sus acciones y se ve obligado a buscar refugio en el monasterio de Shaolin.

programme.title: Acción policial
programme.desc: La leyenda de las artes marciales Jackie Chan presenta la quinta entrega de la franquicia “Acción policial”, incluyendo a Tian Jing (SPECIAL ID) y Rongguang Yu (THE KARATE KID) en una historia de vínculos familiares, traiciones y venganza.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Un amor
programme.desc: Los amigos de la infancia Bruno y Lalo son inseparables. Hasta que una joven hermosa y de espíritu libre llamada Lisa entra en sus vidas, volviéndolos locos y encendiendo un apasionado pero desgarrador triángulo amoroso.

programme.title: Regresa
programme.desc: Una mujer en la ciudad de México tiene problemas maritales y consulta a un terapeuta. Despierta de una hipnosis pensando que es una princesa vasca del siglo XV. Subtitulada en inglés.

programme.title: Ponchao
programme.desc: Alex is destined to become the greatest baseball player ever — and he'll do anything to make it happen. But the road to success proves to be hilariously unpredictable. Subtitled.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: Caso 39
programme.desc: Renée Zellweger, ganadora de un Oscar, protagoniza la película de suspenso sobrenatural de una trabajadora social, que tiene asignado el raro e inquietante caso de Lillith Sullivan, una niña con un extraño y misterioso pasado.

programme.title: El último exorcismo: Parte II
programme.desc: Nell está de nuevo en la seguridad de la civilización y es enviada a vivir en una casa de acogida, donde se la anima a dejar atrás su pasado e iniciar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Darkness
programme.desc: Anna Paquin protagoniza este thriller en el que caracteriza a una adolescente cuya vida cambia cuando su familia se muda a una nueva casa con secretos. Poco después una serie de sucesos sobrenaturales desencadenarán el mal que habita en la casa.

programme.title: ¿Qué más podría pasar?
programme.desc: Un millonario y despiadado hombre de negocios le roba a un ladrón profesional un apreciado anillo de la suerte. El ladrón hará todo lo posible por recuperarlo y el millonario por evitarlo.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: Mi gran boda gay italiana
programme.desc: Antonio ha encontrado por fin al amor de su vida, Paolo, con quien vive felizmente en Berlín. Aunque todavía no están seguros de la reacción de sus familias, deciden casarse en Italia, en el pequeño pueblo donde viven los padres de Antonio.

programme.title: El beso del vampiro
programme.desc: Después de una noche de sexo apasionado donde le muerden en el cuello a un editor literario un poco desquiciado, se convence de que él es un vampiro y comienza a representar el papel.

programme.title: Mordiscos peligrosos
programme.desc: Una vampiresa de siglos de edad llega a L.A. para acosar a hombres vírgenes: necesita su sangre para conservar su juventud y su belleza. Sus objetivos se quedan con un gran apetito por hamburguesas crudas y una tendencia a dormir durante el día.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: Man Of The West
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner, and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an inescapable Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen, James Garner, and Richard Attenborough headline a stellar cast in one of the most ingenious and suspenseful adventure films of all time as a team of Allied soldiers mount a daring escape from an inescapable Nazi POW camp.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution
programme.desc: Tyrone Power, Marlene Dietrich, and Charles Laughton star in this exceptional courtroom Drama about a young man on trial for a wealthy widow's murder after he suspiciously profits from her will.

programme.title: Donovan's Reef
programme.desc: Acclaimed director John Ford and screen legend John Wayne team up for what would be their final collaboration in this boisterous, rowdy South Seas escapade.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Radio detection equipment prohibits Hogan from using their usual radio so they borrow the one in Klink's car.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: LeBeau is passed off as a Gypsy fortune teller to help get a radar countermeasure device to London.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has to help three German scientists escape from Stalag 13 and get to London.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Colonel Hogan and Commandant Klink go to London to steal a plane as part of a plan to ferret out German spies in England.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Posing as German officers, the Heroes try to get a German spy to disclose with whom he was working.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Disguised as a German officer's wife, Newkirk collects penicillin for the underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To capture some secret papers, Hogan has a Russian woman convince Klink to volunteer for the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps prove the German officer that Klink is defending is innocent of treason so he can get the plans that he had stolen for the Allies.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Heroes have to figure how to get a new type of rocket back to England.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude hires a black housekeeper to prove her liberalism and insists that they become friends. Florida is a conscientious housekeeper who wants to be left alone to do her work. But Maude, determined to prove their equality, insists on 'helping' Florida.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Carol learns all about the 'wrath of a woman scorned' when she starts dating a man who jilted her mother before she married Walter. Maude pulls out all the stops to ruin the romance.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Guess who's coming to Maude's fund-raising party for a black militant? Even Maude doesn't know who is coming and who isn't. When the guest of honor is late, Maude panics and insists Florida change clothes and act the role.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is given a speeding ticket by an eager young traffic cop who insists she was doing 34 miles per hour in a 30 miles per hour zone. Arthur offers to have the ticket 'fixed,' but Maude will not hear of it and insists on a full court trial.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: News that Carol is remarrying is taken in stride by Walter, but Maude considers it a disastrous affront to her position as her daughter's best friend and confidante. When Carol plans to marry an old friend, Maude accuses Carol of marrying for convenience.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur is watching the national election results on television with Maude and Walter and reminds them of their stormy courtship days.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude comes home from a routine visit to her doctor with the unexpected news that she is pregnant, which brings strangely divergent reactions from both her daughter and her husband.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's unexpected pregnancy wreaks havoc in the lives of Maude and Walter while they try to decide what to do about it, in the conclusion of a two-part story.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is eagerly awaiting the arrival of her old school chum, hoping to be able to gloat a bit since she knows Phyllis Nash has never married. Expecting her to be an embittered old spinster, Maude gets the surprise of her life.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When one of the teenagers on the block is busted by the police for marijuana possession, Maude, the people's defender, heads a group to keep the youth out of jail.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith answers the door to find a woman on the stoop with a young boy. The woman mentions that she's dropping Mike's son off and leaves. Edith now finds herself in the awkward position of explaining to the rest of the family where the boy came from.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for eight days to spend some time in a commune. Archie and Edith settle down for a quiet game of cards but when she lets him win, Archie insults her and they get into a big fight.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith gets a package in the mail, a mink cape sent to her as a 'thank you' gift by her Cousin Amelia for Edith taking care of her after a surgery. When Archie sees the cape, he takes it the wrong way and demands that she give it back.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: To get some extra cash, Archie has gotten a job driving a taxi. One of his passengers turns out to be Sammy Davis Jr. Sammy inadvertently leaves his briefcase behind and arrangements are made for him to retrieve the briefcase at the Bunker house.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie comes home from the laundromat in fury. It seems that he overloaded one of the machines causing the machine to eat his clothes and cause a flood. The irate proprietor of the laundromat, soon stops by to get Archie to pay for the damages.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix volunteers on behalf of Oscar and himself to take care of a small boy. But on his first visit, the boy is indifferent to the cultural program Felix has planned and fascinated by sloppy Oscar and his hobbies and habits.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix takes refuge with friends Murray and Mimi when Oscar, in the throes of a hangover, asks him to leave in The Breakup. He is convinced that all he has to do is wait until Oscar feels better, but he is wrong.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix suspects Oscar when $50 is missing from the poker bank in The Blackout. Oscar tries to borrow money to get into the weekly poker game and learns his credit is even lower than his bankroll.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Khigh Dhiegh returns as the sinister criminal genius Wo Fat to match wits with McGarrett. A petty criminal is slain during the theft of a secret ballistic missile device, and McGarrett suspects that his arch nemesis, Wo Fat, is behind the theft.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Army officer Jack Gulley, played by Clu Gulager, devises a bizarre scheme to kidnap a top government scientist and collect a ransom of one million dollars in diamonds.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The slaying of a public health official while conducting an investigation into venereal disease leads McGarrett into the world of politics and intrigue. Jay Stewart and Mary Frann guest star.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Keenan Wynn guest stars as the trusted friend of a Chinese diplomat who is the object of an assassination plan which Danny Williams stumbles upon, but whose details he cannot remember when he is injured.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: A family-dominated crime syndicate comes to the surface again after a long period of dormancy.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The Vashon family launches a vendetta against McGarrett in this second installment of a trilogy dealing with an underworld dynasty in Hawaii.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: With his son in prison and his grandson dead — both as a result of McGarrett's actions, the patriarch of the Vashon crime syndicate, old Dominick, devises a cunning scheme to frame the chief of Five-O and send him to prison in disgrace.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone appears to be the only one willing to give the benefit of the doubt to a convict who is accused of a murder while out of prison on a 36-hour pass.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When a corner newspaper vendor goes after the muggers who stole his life savings, Stone and Keller discover that the crime is linked to the murder of a housing commissioner.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is participating in an auto race when he suddenly begins to experience hallucinations. The resulting crash lands him in a private hospital, where the delusions and paranoia continue.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Joe Mannix is visited one night by Ken Gordon, a young police officer whose life Mannix once saved. Unfortunately, moments later Gordon takes a bullet meant for Mannix, fired by Victor Roarke, a criminal whom Mannix once helped capture.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: James Conway, a former priest is targeted for murder because someone confessed a crime to him when he was still a priest, and believes Conway is going to tell.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired by attorney Noah Otway to find out why someone tried to kill Otway's client, Dr. Graham Aspinall, a renowned surgeon whose specialty is removing tumors that are otherwise believed to be inoperable.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. investigates the disappearance of three women in a five week time period, and then gets involved with a psychic to help him when it looks like she might be his best chance of solving the case.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A brilliant scientist (Edward Mulhare) discovers a way to accelerate human evolution and transforms a bitter young coal miner (David McCallum) into the man of the future. But no gift is exactly what it seems…especially in the Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Martin Landau stars as the time-traveler Andro who is desperately trying to stop the birth of a crazed 20th-century inventor whose bacterium invention turns humans into hideous mutants. Shirley Knight co-stars in this classic, touching episode.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Both a cautionary tale and a tight courtroom drama, this haunting episode explores the fear and hostility that result when all privacy is eliminated...and all secrets are revealed! Jeff Corey, Peter Breck, and Alan Baxter star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: In an isolated, snowbound outpost where a handful of people are on alert against enemy attack, a crazed Army major (Harry Guardino) is haunted by the ghost of a soldier he left to die. Sally Kellerman co-stars in one of her earliest TV appearances.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
