programme.desc: Esteban quiere lanzarse a por Candela, pero la jugada no le sale del todo bien porque Rita, la hermana esta, cree que Esteban va a por ella. Los consejos de Gustavo y Tino son muy claros.

programme.title: Los quien
programme.desc: Gustavo y Susana tienen que organizar la fiesta anual de disfraces que hacen con sus amigos de la Universidad. Aunque Susana desde el divorcio no quiere fiestas.

programme.title: Los quien
programme.desc: Después de una noche apasionada, Gustavo cree que ha vuelto con Susana, justo cuando esta recibe los papeles del divorcio.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman cuenta a sus amigos sobre un extraño sueño que tuvo en donde unos ''visitantes'' lo abducen y le ponen una sonda anal. Pero al parecer no fue solo un sueño, ya que algo está desollando a las vacas del pequeño pueblo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos intentan cruzar al elefante de Kyle con ''Fofa'', la cerda de Cartman, para un experimento genético de la escuela con el cual intentan ganarle a Terrance. Mientras, Stan lucha contra los abusos físicos de su hermana, Shelly.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El abuelo de Stan cumple 102 años y quiere suicidarse, pero al no poder hacerlo, le pide a Stan que lo ayude.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cuando Damián, el hijo de Satanás, llega a South Park, él y su padre anuncian que la batalla final con Jesús se realizará en una lucha de boxeo que decidirá quién es el más fuerte.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La señora Broflovski protesta por las actividades navideñas que se realizan en la escuela. Mientras tanto, Kyle se siente solo por ser judío y nadie le cree cuando trata de convencer al pueblo sobre la existencia del señor Mojón.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El señor Garrison se hace una cirugía plástica en la nariz y abandona la enseñanza para convertirse en un modelo. Mientras tanto, Stan se enamora de Ellen, la maestra sustituta, de modo que Wendy, su novia, se pone celosa.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos encuentran un antiguo objeto triangular en una excavación escolar. Luego de salir en el noticiero, Barbra Streisand aparece buscándolo, ya que es lo que necesita para poder convertirse en un monstruo gigante japonés.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartman siente curiosidad de saber quién es su padre, pero averiguarlo no es una tarea fácil debido a que su madre se acostó con muchos hombres.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Continuación de ''La mamá de Cartman es una puta sucia'', en el que Cartman quiere averiguar quién es su padre. Con la ayuda de Chef, los chicos tienen que salvar al Doctor Mephesto luego de recibir un disparo.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El Sr. Mackey es despedido de la escuela por perder una hoja de marihuana durante una presentación en contra de las drogas. Entretanto, los chicos tratan de salvar a Ike de su fiesta ''bris'' en donde le harán la circuncisión.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Aunque todos odian jugar a los quemados, los chicos están obligados a participar en el campeonato. Mientras tanto, Sheila lucha para que se conozca el caso de ''mixlésia de hermanos siameses'' de la enfermera escolar.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos tienen que escribir sobre la guerra de Vietnam así que visitan a Jimbo y Ned en el set de su programa de caza y matanza, el cual está compitiendo por el rating con Jesús y sus amigos.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El autobús escolar va por una carretera nevada hasta que, por accidente, termina atascado al borde de un barranco. La señora Crabtree sale a buscar ayuda, pero primero les dice a los chicos que si bajan, un monstruo se los comerá.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Una prohibición de fuegos artificiales amenaza las festividades del 4 de julio hasta que el alcalde idea un plan poner a South Park nuevamente en el mapa.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: El festival de cine independiente, Sundance, se traslada a South Park atrayendo a mucha gente al pequeño pueblo y al parecer, todo esto afecta el medio ambiente, y el señor Mojón cada vez se encuentra peor.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos son obligados por sus madres a dormir en la casa de Kenny para que se contagien la varicela. Al mismo tiempo, Sheila intenta arreglar la amistad perdida entre su marido y el padre de Kenny.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Los chicos van de excursión al planetario y un empleado les lava el cerebro con efectos visuales para que quieran volver allí. Mientras, Cartman solo se preocupa por ganar un casting para salir en el nuevo comercial de “Quesitos Poofs”.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Todo South Park festeja el "Día de las vacas", que incluyen una feria, un monumento y la corrida de las vacas. Mientras tanto, los chicos hacen lo que sea para ganar unos muñecos de Terrance y Philip.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La ''tía Regla'' de Stan le regala un pez dorado que le da mucho miedo y comienzan a haber asesinatos que la mamá de Stan trata de encubrir. Mientras tanto, Cartman se comporta muy extraño de repente y tiene barba.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: Tommy is on a path to avenge LaKeisha's murder; Elisa Marie investigates what's on the USB stick given to her by her father; Tommy must destroy the evidence, and he may need Ghost's help to retrieve it.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Tate tasks Dre to kill Ghost; Tate's hatred toward St. Patrick motivates him to lie during a Federal questioning; the Feds are in striking distance of convicting St. Patrick for Silver's murder.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: After their mother is arrested, twins Janelle and Tal are sent to live with their Uncle Al in Atlanta, where Janelle learns about the High Water performing arts school in their new neighborhood.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Forced outsider her comfort zone, Janelle struggles at her High Water audition; Tal confronts his bullies.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tal battles to keep up with his new classmates; Sage makes an unexpected announcement; Davis is faced with a family issue that could derail his future.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Janelle and Dondre can't seem to hide their true feelings; alliances at High Water are challenged.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage's troubles start trending; Dondre discovers that Janelle has been keeping a secret from him.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Parents of a teenage girl disappear from a highway gas station.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Brooke investigate the disappearance of a woman from a plane while in flight.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Fernando y sus cómplices fingen un asalto para recuperar el dinero del chantaje de Marcela. Ella trata de huir y le disparan. La policía llega y la encuentra con vida. Teresa Cristina es interrogada y su abogado se da cuenta de que ella oculta algo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Ty conversa con Marisa, preocupado por el sufrimiento de su hijo, pero la decisión ya está tomada. Cristóbal no acepta ni entiende las declaraciones que ofrece Marisa por televisión. Sara se aprovecha para convertirse en su mejor compañía.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara intenta seducir a Cristóbal. Constantín es arrestado y Estanislao se queda sin aliados, la policía está muy cerca de atraparlo. Belinda le miente a Goyo sobre la paternidad del bebé. La boda de Leticia y Rolando es inminente.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal autoriza la visita de Oscar con Víctor al hotel. Sara Montiel está dispuesta a manchar sus manos con sangre. Lucas interrumpe la boda y acusa a Rolando de tratante de blancas, mientras Richard revisa la veracidad de esa información.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa se defiende de las recomendaciones de Sara en la boda de Leticia. Richard interroga a Estanislao y lo persuade para que confiese su vinculación en el robo de las joyas, mientras inicia investigaciones en torno a Bruno y sus visitas a Yaya.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia Guardiola, viuda de Amador Blanco, vuelve para reclamar a sus gemelos. Tras años de prisión por un delito que no cometió, se enfrenta a su suegra y se enamora de su cuñado, sin sospechar las oscuras consecuencias.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Bárbara busca a Máximo y le pide dinero para conseguir la custodia de Kikito. Antonio se compra un auto con el dinero que Griselda le dio para los libros. Ella se lo quita y le da una lección. Teresa Cristina decide terminar, ella misma, con Marcela.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Teresa Cristina se cuela disfrazada en la habitación de Marcela y la asfixia con una almohada. La enfermera reconoce a "la rubia" por los videos de seguridad. Fernando se lleva a Teresa Cristina a un motel, para que cumpla con su parte del trato.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: José Salinas visita a Teresa Cristina y enseguida hay química entre ellos. No hay pistas de quién pueda ser la rubia del hospital, pero la enfermera va al entierro de Marcela y descubre algo. Máximo le da dinero a Bárbara para que pelee por Kikito.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: One teammate will start hanging upside-down from a crane bound by their wrists and ankles in the air. Contestants with the highest card will determine who gets what cocktail. Couples will be strung parallel of each other from windows.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a one hundred and ten foot tower. Each contestant will be asked to eat 6 worms in 4 minutes. Each contestant will have to find their way through an underground tunnel.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into the case with the contestants. Each contestant will be holding a paint ball gun and harnessed to a reverse bungee line.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants are strapped to a line on the deck, with their bungees attached to a helicopter. Contestants will cut their way through two separate ropes. Contestants are connected to a helicopter and must repel down.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Two contestants are seated in the front of a car. The driver is blind folded and the passenger must navigate for them. Player is strapped down in a coffin and then covered with 500 Tarantulas.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from moving helicopter onto a floating platform. Place 60 pink toed tarantulas into torture hat and stay still for 3 minutes. The contestant lies in a plexi-glass tube as water is pumped in.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be locked in a plexi-glass box that will be hung from a crane, lowered into the water. A contestant bobs into a tank of fluid. One will be driving the main car and the other will be driving the ramp car along a flatbed semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The parents my make their way across the ledge of the Universal Orlando while their child stands on their shoulders. The mother son team must retrieve keys. Contestants are seated in a car and must and lock it into position underneath a moving semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each couple is standing on the edge of the roof. Contestant will be sealed into a cage filled with roaches. The cage will be locked on the outside. Contestants are driving behind a flatbed and their opponents are releasing barrels to distract them.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A contestant will be seated in the driver's seat of a limousine, the second contestant will be in the trunk. The contestant will be tied into their seat and to the steering wheel of a automobile.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To run through a vertical obstacle course. Contestants will put their head inside the box with 24 rats. To cross a plank suspend between to speeding semi-trucks.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants must leap back and forth from the boats to get as many flags. Contestant is put into a vat used for stomping on grapes to make wine. Contestant must walk the length of the truck removing flags along the way.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will walk across a truss suspended above the ground wearing a chain mail suit. Contestants will shoot a flaming arrow from a cross bow at a scarecrow target. Contestant is secured into an upright coffin, filled with bugs.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty wants to adopt the boy with disabilities. A custody battle occurs with the biological parents.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark rescue victims trapped in a car, thanks to a helpful dog.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help a loving mother come to terms with her young son’s terminal illness

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: Monica and Tess help a successful judge cope with the deteriorating health and memory of her beloved mother

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels help a distraught couple deal with a family tragedy that threatens to destroy their marriage

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The angels converge on a small town in Texas to witness a Christmas miracle

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Arriving in Washington, Dr. Mike and Sully find it difficult to find anyone to listen to their concerns. Sully is arrested for army desertion, while a plot against the president is overheard. Michaela must break Sully out of jail to expose the conspiracy.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When money becomes short for Sully, he tries everything to make ends meet rather than accept help from Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully are traveling through dangerous Indian country when their stagecoach is robbed, and they are abandoned.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers a lump in Dorothy's breast and tries to convince her to have surgery. Hank tries Ladies Night at the saloon, and Jake and Loren have a plan to get free drinks. Colleen deals with hurtful boyish pranks from classmates.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Another angel is upset that Jonathan has been assigned to find a mate for his widow.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Bickering couples go on a trip to learn what it was that brought them together.

programme.title: Maximum Risk
programme.desc: Prepare for Maximum Van Damage when action superstar Jean-Claude Van Damme is joined by sexy newcomer Natasha Henstridge (Species). Rated: R

programme.title: Nowhere to Run
programme.desc: An escaped prisoner hiding from authorities, Sam always manages to be in the wrong place at the right time. Risking his hard-fought freedom, he aids a beautiful young widow against a ruthless developer who wants her land. Rating: R

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: A highly trained operative, is double crossed & left for dead by someone in her own agency. When things go haywire, she finds ways to turn the tables on her ruthless adversary.

programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin, and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Death Warrant
programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude van Damme ("Bloodsport", "Cyborg") is a veteran undercover cop posing as an inmate in a dangerously corrupt state prison.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Lido di Manhattan, un local italiano con una cocina antiestética y un propietario sin experiencia. Está tan horrorizado que cierra el lugar temporalmente.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita el Pabellón Español en Nueva Jersey. Descubre que un par de hermanos en disputa están llevando el restaurante al suelo. Contiene lenguaje para adultos.

programme.title: Ana Avellana
programme.desc: Ana Avellana nos enseña a hacer un postre a base de la refrescante uva burdeos. Tarta de uva, "pop tart" de uva, témpano de uva y "grape trifle". Grandes opciones para disfrutar de esta deliciosa fruta.

programme.title: Ana Avellana
programme.desc: En este capítulo, Ana Avellana nos enseña cómo hacer deliciosas ensaladas: ensalada de cuña, ensalada de remolacha y ensalada de pasta. Un placer saludable.

programme.title: Ana Avellana
programme.desc: Ana Avellana nos prepara diferentes variedades de rosquillas: rellenas, con diferentes glaseados, agujeros, y un café americano para acompañar.

programme.title: Ana Avellana
programme.desc: En este episodio, Ana Avellana celebra a las madres y prepara yogur brulee, tostadas francesas, puré de aguacate con ensalada de rábanos y un delicioso postre de chirimoya en su día.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar fue a Santiago de Surco y había un pez que logró llamar su atención llamado chiri. Lo probará en tres platos diferentes para ver cómo queda. ¡Veamos el resultado!

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Breña es un distrito reconocido en Lima y nuestro carismático chef Kumar Paredes acudió a uno de los mercados de este distrito en busca de peje blanco. Seamos testigos de esta aventura.

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Finaliza la primera temporada y volveremos a ver a Kumar en Santiago de Surco. Preparará un pescado en tres platos distintivos llamado fortuno. ¿Funcionará?

programme.title: Pescado desconocido
programme.desc: Kumar está interesado en saber cuál es el sabor de la doncella, así que fuimos a Lince a buscar este pescado y verá que da como resultado tres platos que preparará. ¡Seamos parte de lo que viene a continuación, vamos!

programme.title: Cocinar desde cero
programme.desc: Hoy, el chef Joe recibe un nuevo cuchillo hecho a medida y prepara deliciosos tamales desde cero.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, the body of exotic dancer Rachel Siani was found beneath a New Jersey bridge. Investigators wondered if she had committed suicide. They discovered that Rachel offered to assist a drunk customer named John "Jack" Denofa to his motel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Michigan State University grad student disappeared and was presumed dead. With the help of a professor of geological sciences, police hoped to get the "dirt" on her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zack must overcome his fear of spiders to face Rita's newest monster.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita and her evil Spit Flower monster set out to ruin Kimberly's design for a float in the world peace parade.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita's Frankenstein monster crashes the Power Rangers' Halloween costume party.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and Tommy must learn to work together to stop Rita's Super Putties.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita turns Kimberly's grandmother's spinning wheel into her dangerous new weapon.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita traps the Power Rangers on a mysterious island where not all is as it appears.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers must overcome their own fears to escape Rita's Island of Illusion.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Jason and his cousin Jeremy find a map that leads to a powerful ancient mirror.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly's day goes from bad to worse when the Samurai Fanman captures her.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Tommy is called to rescue his friends while given the opportunity to audition for a martial arts commercial.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The teens are rehearsing for a talent show. Tommy and Jason are rehearsing for a karate exhibition; In the meantime, Finster has prepared another monster, Fang, to destroy the teens and sends him down to Earth.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita's latest scheme involves The Green Ranger. She makes plans to kidnap The Green Ranger and uses a green candle made out of magic wax that will absorb the Green Ranger's power. When the candle burns out, the Green Ranger's power will belong to Rita.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita’s green candle is still burning and slowly draining Tommy's powers. The only way to stop Rita from gaining the Green Ranger's power is for someone to go into the Dark Dimension and retrieve the candle.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zack is preparing Cameron, his young protégé, for the Angel Grove Junior Martial Arts Competition. As soon as the tournament is about to begin, Zack has to bail out to answer a more pressing call because Rita has sent another monster.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Trini has designed a Clean-Up Club, a club that meets once a week to clean up and recycle around Angel Grove. Rita, as usual, is not pleased and plans to pollute the planet even further by sending in her latest monster.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: This may be Rita's most diabolical play yet. She sends to Earth five exact replicas of the Power Rangers. These Rangers are evil, and they soon frame the real Power Rangers with their wrong doings.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The city gathers at Angel Grove Park for a Power Ranger celebration, the Mayor wants to thank the Rangers for their heroics in defending the city from Rita's attacks.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Zords are recharging after taking a fierce beating from Cyclopsis. Lokar and Cyclopsis set forth to destroy Angel Grove. Zordon warns the teens that their Zords will not be ready for another twelve hours.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the teens go to the park to plant saplings for their science project, Rita sends down Squatt to plant her evil Octoplant. Bulk and Skull, who are nearby, are scared by Squatt and run into a portable bathroom which is picked up by a dump truck.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: It's the return of Pudgy Pig! When the Power Rangers participate in Angel Grove’s Adopt a Pet day, a little old lady leaves them her pet pig, Norman.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Billy, who has an aversion toward fish, picnics at the park pond with Kimberly while the others go scuba diving. Aware of Billy's weakness, Rita creates her poisonous Goo Fish monster to destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: The teens compete in their high school Oddball Games and win the coveted Noble Lion Trophy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: When the Power Rangers go up to Billy's uncle's mountain resort to study for their science test, Goldar seizes the opportunity of having them altogether to call on the Crystal of Nightmares.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: While the teens are discussing the sad possibility that Ernie may have to close down the Youth Center due to financial problems, Jason shows up with an adorable stray dog.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Truman discovers that Dr. K was responsible for creating the Venjix Virus.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When Dillon discovers that the two keys to his watch fit together to play another song, he uses it to try and reach Tenaya 7.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Dillon is betrayed when he and Tenaya 7 break into the Venjix Palace to retrieve codes that are needed to stop an attack bot.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Dillon's search for Tenaya is put on hold when Scott is shot with a key that allows Shifter to control him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Ziggy must pay back the 5 milion he owes Fresno Bob.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Ziggy accidentally teleports he and Dr. K into a cave.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: Dillon fears the virus will take him over.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: When the magnetic blast goes off and all the electricity goes out in Corinth, Venjix moves to take the city.

programme.title: Power Rangers: R.P.M.
programme.desc: The Rangers race to insert a virus into Venjix before he takes over Corinth.

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Catch the key moments from an instant classic on the streets of Baku!

programme.title: Race in 30
programme.desc: Catch up on all the action from Formula 1's 15th visit to the streets of Singapore.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From Marina Bay Street Circuit in Singapore.

programme.title: Formula 1 Racing
programme.desc: From Circuit of the Americas in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Join us to hear from F1 Academy Managing Director, Susie Wolff, on all things F1 Academy and find out what the drivers have been up to pre-season, plus highlights from Qualifying and both Races.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped
programme.desc: Come and join us for a day in Miami with F1 Academy drivers, Courtney Crone and Nerea Marti, and hear from Doriane Pin after her dominating weekend at the first round of the 2024 season in Saudi.

programme.title: F1A Weekend Wrapped

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A mysterious dome blocks Mateo and the others from leaving their dream landing, and Zoey and Albert are their only hope of escape.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: At the 2000 All-Star Game, Derek Jeter and Chipper Jones both go 3-for-3. The American League scores three insurance runs in the top of the 9th inning to secure their 6-3 victory over the National League.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: In his 19th and final All-Star Game, Cal Ripken Jr. hits a home run to lead the American League to a 4-1 victory over the National League. The 2001 All-Star Game was also the final game for Padres right fielder Tony Gwynn.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: Ichiro Suzuki makes history in 2007 by hitting the first ever inside-the-park home run during an All-Star Game. He was rewarded MVP for going 3-for-3 at the plate and collecting two RBIs in an American League victory, 5-4.

programme.title: Great Games: All-Star
programme.desc: The 2008 MLB All-Star Game at Yankee Stadium was marked as the longest All-Star Game in history. It ended after 4 hours and 50 minutes in the 15th inning on a walk-of sacrifice fly from Michael Young.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/65: Sandy Koufax finishes a complete-game shutout in Game 7 of the 1965 World Series to bring home a championship. The Dodgers' 2-0 victory was capped in the top of the 4th inning when runs scored on a homer and an RBI single.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Outlaw (of Gor)
programme.desc: A hero and loser friend are transplanted to the planet of Gor by mysterious forces and are soon caught up in an evil sorcerer's plot of dastardly evil.

programme.title: MST3K: Pod People
programme.desc: A child adopts a large egg which hatches into a mischievous alien, while a group of pop musicians on a wilderness vacation runs into trouble.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Mitchell
programme.desc: The trio sit through a dreary Joe Don Baker disasterpiece as Gypsy tries to find a way to save Joel from being killed by the Mads.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Last Of The Wild Horses
programme.desc: A cowboy winds up in the middle of a turf war between a rancher and his neighbors in Last of the Wild Horses.

programme.title: Film Crew: The Wild Women of Wongo
programme.desc: Bob Honcho orders the Film Crew to provide a commentary track for the bizarre prehistoric adventure film, The Wild Women of Wongo (1958).

programme.title: MST3K: Being From Another Planet
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch a re-edited version of Time Walker (1982) called "Being From Another Planet" in which a mummy awakened by a university team goes on a killing spree.

programme.title: MST3K: Bloodlust
programme.desc: Mike and the Bots watch a cheap ripoff of The Most Dangerous Game, where a rich game hunter tricks a group of stranded college kids into becoming prey for his latest blood sport.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Julio, JV y Gab reciben a la ex de JV. Vascki, Camilla, Ortega, JV, Gab y Mari F disfrutan de una fiesta fuera de la casa pero no se imaginan que uno de ellos se quedará fuera. En Cabine dos Segredos, el público elige a JV como el payaso de la casa.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: Haeixa, Julienne y Abelha dan la bienvenida a Bruno. Julienne y él disfrutan de una cita en plan romántico. Mary M da una calurosa bienvenida al novato Bruno y los dos terminan la noche besándose.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex : Caribe (LAS)
programme.desc: La actividad final hace arder a la multitud y la casa tiembla con una pelea entre Haeixa, Let y JV. El último día, todos disfrutan de un súper brunch, con muchas lágrimas. Cierran la temporada sacudiendo botines en el programa de Ryan Castro.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After achieving success in her younger years, brilliant septuagenarian Madeline Matlock uses her unassuming demeanor to make her way into a position at a prestigious law firm, Jacobson Moore.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Why would anyone confess to a murder they didn’t commit? Ben’s trying to help his reporter friend beat a murder charge, but when she’s caught in a lie even Ben isn’t convinced she’s innocent.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When blackmail leads to murder, the evidence leads straight to Ben’s old reporter friend. With a client who’s not talking, even Ben is starting to have his doubts. While everyone thinks she is guilty, Ben must work hard to prove his friend’s innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the defense of a young attorney accused of murdering her boss, a man she was about to blow the whistle on for sexually harassing his female employees.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes head-to-head with a millionaire bent on revenge. Ben has to get inside the mind of a diabolical killer to avenge the death of his best friend.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A frame-up finds Matlock immersed in libel, scandal, and tales of alien spaceships! Delving into the lurid world of tabloid publishing, Matlock and his new investigator, Jerri Stone, sort through the world’s weirdest clues to solve a murder.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Wonder what it's like to go up in a bucket lift? Mister Rogers rides 60 feet up in the air in one and then comes back down. Mr. McFeely has a video about how people make ice cream.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about the graceful nature of the fish. He visits a ballet studio where he watches a performance. Lady Elaine wants H.J. Elephant to be on her first program, but H.J. is hesitant since he cannot read very well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What's in Mister Rogers' box? There are words for people who know how to read words, pictures for people who know how to read pictures and a toy truck! Mister Rogers shows a video with different big trucks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: H.J. Elephant recieves help from Mayor Maggie as he reads his first words. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make ball caps. Before he leaves, Mr. McFeely is allowed to take one of Mister Rogers' caps with him.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bag of sand, which he takes to the back yard, where he adds it to his sand table. Lady Elaine Fairchilde is not impressed with the art creations made by the others and appoints herself judge of the festival.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers creates a replica of Trolley out of dough. Lady Elaine is not impressed with Neighbor Aber's artwork, but King Friday finds it inspirational. Daniel Tiger is sad because Lady Elaine has criticized his artwork.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets a musician playing a glass harmonica. Dr. Platypus practices his bagpipes with Handyman Negri on guitar and King Friday on the bass violin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: It's the Neighborhood of Make-Believe Arts Festival, and all the neighbors are finding their own ways to express themselves. Mister Rogers encourages his "television friends" to appreciate the wide variety of art!

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pretzel factory to see how people make pretzels. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday and Queen Sara have an argument, which worries Prince Tuesday. He runs away to the home of his friend Daniel Tiger.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes on an airplane and visits with the pilot and flight attendant, who show him around the plane to help children feel more familiar when traveling by air.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches former Pittsburgh Steeler wide receiver Lynn Swann practice ballet with a dance company. He tells Mister Rogers how dancing has helped him play football. Lynn Swann also visits the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Odisea Volcánica
programme.desc: El folclore volcánico se refleja en la historia de México. Una de sus antiguas leyendas cuenta la historia del guerrero azteca Popocatépetl, un volcán activo gigante.

programme.title: Odisea Volcánica
programme.desc: En Indonesia, encontramos regiones donde el aire es tan tóxico que está 40 veces por encima de los niveles seguros para los humanos y fugas de ácido sulfúrico del suelo en densas nubes amarillentas.

programme.title: Odisea Volcánica
programme.desc: Japón atraviesa una crisis sísmica tras el devastador Tsunami de 2011. Observamos de cerca dos volcanes muy peligrosos, ambos están considerados entre los 5 más peligrosos del planeta.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Casi todo es excusa para celebrar en Ibiza. Los ibicencos celebran en la playa, en barcos y en villas. Una isla rica en historia antigua, los lugareños también celebran fiestas tradicionales en sus pueblos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Esta es la legendaria St. Barts, una isla que ha combinado con éxito las tradiciones con el modernismo y sigue siendo un destino principal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony viaja a la capital del cinturón de cereales de Minneapolis, Minnesota, para experimentar de primera mano el conflicto entre los operadores creativos independientes y las franquicias genéricas.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué tipo de barbacoa reina en la ciudad de Kansas, Houston o Carolina del Norte? Tony viaja a las tres ciudades para probar por sí mismo los secretos que esconden las salsas, los huesos de madera y los fumadores lentos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubra Londres, un centro cosmopolita con una gran influencia en el mundo de las finanzas, las artes y la moda, y una ciudad cargada de historia.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Muscat, el Cuerno de África, los sultanes, el camino del incienso, el estrecho de Ormuz, el Océano Índico y el “desierto de los desiertos” excitan la imaginación y son sinónimos de las leyendas del pasado de Omán.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: La estrategia del predador tiene que ser mejor que la de su víctima para poder ganar el derecho de vivir un día más en la salvaje naturaleza.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: El antiguo Egipto dependía fuertemente del río Nilo. Sus inundaciones anuales extendieron limo fértil a las tierras de cultivo, estimulando la economía de la civilización.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Africa's Big Cats es una mirada cercana a la vida de tres familias de los depredadores felinos más efectivos e icónicos de África que viven en el famoso Parque Kruger: una leona, un leopardo y dos guepardos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto

programme.desc: These girls got on the wrong path and are convinced that their mothers don't deserve their respect. Some have had babies and are ready to have more. But MAURY and his team of experts are here to try and set these girls back on the right track.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Cheaters, cheaters and more cheaters! Today’s MAURY is full of drama, shock and temptation. These guests simply can’t keep their hands to themselves when faced with a tempting situation and find themselves in deep trouble with their partners!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Nick denies Chantelle's baby, but she wants to prove he's the father and make him pay up. Mario's mother Evette says she went "undercover" to prove that Sierra cheated on her son and that he is not her baby's father! What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These denying dads swear there's no way they're the father! These moms need to prove them wrong. The only thing that's missing is the truth! DNA results don't lie, but after the results are read, who will be left looking for more answers?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
